lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ਅਮਿਉ ਰਸੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit baanee amiau ras amrit har kaa naau |
lines.english: The Bani of the Guru's Word is Ambrosial Nectar; its taste is sweet. The Name of the Lord is Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man tan hiradai simar har aatth pehar gun gaau |
lines.english: Meditate in remembrance on the Lord in your mind, body and heart; twenty-four hours a day, sing His Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਸੁਣਹੁ ਤੁਮ ਗੁਰਸਿਖਹੁ ਸਚਾ ਇਹੈ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: aupades sunahu tum gurasikhahu sachaa ihai suaau |
lines.english: Listen to these Teachings, O Sikhs of the Guru. This is the true purpose of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਆਨਦੁ ਘਣਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਪਤਿਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sookh sehaj aanad ghanaa prabh japatiaa dukh jaae |
lines.english: Celestial peace and absolute bliss come when one meditates on God - suffering is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਹੋਇ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਲਾਇਹੁ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam padaarath safal hoe man meh laaeihu bhaau |
lines.english: This priceless human life will be made fruitful; embrace love for the Lord in your mind.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਈਐ ਥਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam japat sukh aoopajai daragah paaeeai thaau |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, peace wells up, and one obtains a place in the Court of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਮਤਿ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaaeeai gur pooraa mat dee |
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; this is the Teaching imparted by the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਭੋਗੀਐ ਭਾਣੈ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai dukh sukh bhogeeai bhaanai karam karee |
lines.english: In the Lord's Will, pain and pleasure are experienced; in the Lord's Will, actions are performed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸੰਜਮੋ ਭਾਣੈ ਹੀ ਕਢਿ ਲੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai jap tap sanjamo bhaanai hee kadt lee |
lines.english: In the Lord's Will, they practice meditation, austerity and self-discipline; in the Lord's Will, they are released.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਜੋਨਿ ਭਵਾਈਐ ਭਾਣੈ ਬਖਸ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai jon bhavaaeeai bhaanai bakhas karee |
lines.english: In the Lord's Will, they are made to wander in reincarnation; in the Lord's Will, they are forgiven.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਭੋਗ ਭੋਗਾਇਦਾ ਭਾਣੈ ਮਨਹਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai bhog bhogaaeidaa bhaanai maneh karee |
lines.english: In the Lord's Will, enjoyments are enjoyed; in the Lord's Will, these enjoyments are denied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਮਿਟੀ ਸਾਜਿ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੋਤਿ ਧਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai mittee saaj kai bhaanai jot dharee |
lines.english: In the Lord's Will, clay is fashioned into form; in the Lord's Will, His Light is infused into it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਨਰਕਿ ਸੁਰਗਿ ਅਉਤਾਰੇ ਭਾਣੈ ਧਰਣਿ ਪਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaanai narak surag aautaare bhaanai dharan paree |
lines.english: In the Lord's Will, they are incarnated in heaven and hell; in the Lord's Will, they fall to the ground.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੈ ਹੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਲਾਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhaanai hee jis bhagatee laae naanak virale he |2|
lines.english: In the Lord's Will, they are committed to His devotional worship and Praise; O Nanak, how rare are these! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਸੂ ਪਰੇਤ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਉਧਾਰੇ ਇਕ ਖਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: pasoo paret agiaan udhaare ik khane |
lines.english: Even ignorant beasts and goblins can be saved, in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਿਆਈ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਹਉ ਜੀਵਾ ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: vaddiaaee sache naam kee hau jeevaa sun sune |
lines.english: Hearing, hearing of the glorious greatness of the True Name, I live.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਭੁਖ ਵਿਕਰਾਲ ਨਾਇ ਤੇਰੈ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa bhukh vikaraal naae terai dhraapeeai |
lines.english: The most horrible thirst and hunger is satisfied through Your Name, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਉ ਸਦਾ ਸਦ ਜਾਪੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: dinas rain teraa naau sadaa sad jaapeeai |
lines.english: Day and night, chant the Name, forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗੁ ਸੋਗੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਵੰਞੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਉ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: rog sog dukh vanyai jis naau man vasai |
lines.english: Disease, sorrow and pain run away, when the Name dwells within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੰਡ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਉਧਾਰਣਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: khandd brahamandd beant udhaaranahaariaa |
lines.english: The worlds and solar systems are saved by the Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਲਾਲੁ ਜੋ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਰਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: tiseh paraapat laal jo gurasabadee rasai |
lines.english: He alone attains his Beloved, who loves the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਤ੍ਰੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀ ਮੈ ਛਡਿ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਰੰਗਿ ਕਸੁੰਭੈ ਭੁਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: mitru piaaraa naanak jee mai chhadd gavaaeaa rang kasunbhai bhulee |
lines.english: I abandoned and lost my Beloved Friend, O Nanak; I was fooled by the transitory color of the safflower, which fades away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਚੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: teree sobhaa tudh sache mere piaariaa |12|
lines.english: Your glory is Yours alone, O my Beloved True Lord. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਸਜਣ ਕੀ ਮੈ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਪਉਦੀ ਹਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਢੁ ਨ ਲਹਦੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tau sajan kee mai keem na paudee hau tudh bin adt na lahadee |1|
lines.english: I did not know Your value, O my Friend; without You, I am not worth even half a shell. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭੇ ਭਸੁ ਪੁਣੇਦੇ ਵਤਨੁ ਜਾ ਮੈ ਸਜਣੁ ਤੂਹੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: habhe bhas punede vatan jaa mai sajan toohai |2|
lines.english: They can all just play in the dust, when You are my Friend, O Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸੁ ਵਿਰਾਇਣਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਉ ਸਸੁਰਾ ਵਾਦੀ ਜੇਠੋ ਪਉ ਪਉ ਲੂਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: sas viraaein naanak jeeo sasuraa vaadee jettho pau pau loohai |
lines.english: My mother-in-law is my enemy, O Nanak; my father-in-law is argumentative and my brother-in-law burns me at every step.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਵੁਠਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: jis too vutthaa chit tis darad nivaarano |
lines.english: You relieve the pains of those, within whose consciousness You dwell, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਵੁਠਾ ਚਿਤਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹਾਰਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: jis too vutthaa chit tis kade na haarano |
lines.english: Those, within whose consciousness You dwell, never lose.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਪੂਰਾ ਗੁਰੂ ਸੁ ਸਰਪਰ ਤਾਰਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: jis miliaa pooraa guroo su sarapar taarano |
lines.english: One who meets the Perfect Guru will surely be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਲਾਏ ਸਚਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਮੑਾਲਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: jis no laae sach tis sach samaalano |
lines.english: One who is attached to Truth, contemplates Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਆਇਆ ਹਥਿ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਸੁ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਾਲਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: jis aaeaa hath nidhaan su rahiaa bhaalano |
lines.english: One, into whose hands the treasure comes, stops searching.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਸਭਨਾ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁ ਬਿਰਹੀ ਚਾਰਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: ohu sabhanaa kee ren birahee chaarano |
lines.english: He is the dust under the feet of all; he is the lover of the Lord's feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਇਕੋ ਰੰਗੁ ਭਗਤੁ ਸੋ ਜਾਨਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: jis no iko rang bhagat so jaanano |
lines.english: He alone is known as a devotee, who loves the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸਤਤਿ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀ ਮੈ ਹਭ ਵਞਾਈ ਛੋੜਿਆ ਹਭੁ ਕਿਝੁ ਤਿਆਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: ausatat nindaa naanak jee mai habh vayaaee chhorriaa habh kijh tiaagee |
lines.english: I have totally discarded praise and slander, O Nanak; I have forsaken and abandoned everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਚੋਜ ਵਿਡਾਣ ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਕਾਰਣੋ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: sabh tere choj viddaan sabh teraa kaarano |13|
lines.english: Everything is Your wonderful play; the whole creation is Yours. ||13||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭੇ ਸਾਕ ਕੂੜਾਵੇ ਡਿਠੇ ਤਉ ਪਲੈ ਤੈਡੈ ਲਾਗੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: habhe saak koorraave dditthe tau palai taiddai laagee |1|
lines.english: I have seen that all relationships are false, and so I have grasped hold of the hem of Your robe, Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਦੀ ਫਿਰਦੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਉ ਹਉ ਫਾਵੀ ਥੀਈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਦਿਸਾਵਰ ਪੰਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: firadee firadee naanak jeeo hau faavee theeee bahut disaavar pandhaa |
lines.english: I wandered and wandered and went crazy, O Nanak, in countless foreign lands and pathways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਹਉ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੁਖਾਲੀ ਸੁਤੀ ਜਾ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਜਣੁ ਮੈ ਲਧਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa hau sukh sukhaalee sutee jaa gur mil sajan mai ladhaa |2|
lines.english: But then, I slept in peace and comfort, when I met the Guru, and found my Friend. ||2||
